title: Fallen World - Prehistoric Corruption
description: The best minecraft rpg story modpack
body:
![Fallen world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/192f0e753892e84cf651f19b44de7bd971267173.webp)
![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eea9060c38a889d8f774a4ce7a3226874ff6cb5.webp)
# **_One of the biggest rpg modpacks ever_**
[![ModDex rating](https://moddex.gg/badges/projects/fallen-world-mr-R0kQ9CCo/rating.svg?style=banner)](https://moddex.gg/modpack/fallen-world-mr-R0kQ9CCo)

Fallen world is an rpg modpack that makes the game fun to explore and makes the world dangerous. in the beginning you have a problem surviving but soon you will reach a position where you can survive. This modpack is trying to make minecraft into a game like elden ring or dark souls with many new mods, magic features, bosses, new biomes and a lot more.

## Lore

Fallen world has an expansive story of you fighting your way throught the world and eventually you find and defeat the four kings that have ruled the world for years. After that gods get angry at you for killing the kings and they start sending their monsters to hunt you down. After you kill those monsters the god descends to the world and you have to fight him to death. After the fight ends the gods send you to the bottom of the world and you have to fight through five difficult dimensions to go back home.

## About

Fallen world is a modpack that triest to be as fun as possible to the player and it tries it's best to make the story in the pack as fun as possible. This modpack is designed for the players and quests and mods are thested and should be good, but if for some reason something doesn't work then you can join my discord server to report the issue.

## content:
- A detailed questline with over 100 different quests to work through
- completely overhauled world with new and amazing dungeons to explore.
- Over 50 new bosses to fight with story related to each one
- tons of custom content like custom boss spawning mechanics, items and quests.
- 5 new dimensions
- 4 questlines.
